Who I Am

About Me

Curious to learn, eager to grow — every day is a step closer to the future I am building.

Hello! I'm P. Gayathri, currently in my 1st year of BCA at RD National Arts and Science College, Erode. I embarked on this college journey with a clear goal: to build strong technical knowledge and practical skills that will shape a meaningful career in technology.

Beyond the classroom, I find joy and balance in drawing, painting, and arts & crafts — creative outlets that keep me expressive and inspired. I'm also proficient in four languages, which gives me the ability to communicate across diverse environments with ease.

Career Objective

To leverage my growing passion for technology and innate creativity to contribute meaningfully to academic and professional environments. I aim to build a well-rounded skill set that bridges technical proficiency with creative thinking, making me a versatile and impactful professional — starting with excellence during my BCA program and internship opportunities.
